journeys.name: Login as recruiter and redirect to /recruiter
journeys.description: Authenticate as Coach Williams and confirm redirect to the recruiter area

journeys.name: Pipeline page loads with Pipeline Dashboard heading
journeys.description: Navigate to pipeline and verify 'Pipeline Dashboard' heading renders

journeys.name: Pipeline no bad text
journeys.description: Pipeline page does not render undefined, NaN, null, or [object Object]

journeys.name: Pipeline no stuck loading
journeys.description: Pipeline page finishes loading within timeout — no infinite spinners

journeys.name: Kanban columns visible: Identified, Contacted, Evaluating, Visit Scheduled, Offered, Committed
journeys.description: All six pipeline columns render with correct titles in the Kanban board

journeys.name: Pipeline shows prospect count in header
journeys.description: Pipeline header displays a 'prospect(s)' count text showing the total number of athletes

journeys.name: Pipeline filter: Class Year dropdown present and interactive
journeys.description: Class Year filter dropdown is visible and can be clicked to show options

journeys.name: Pipeline filter: Position dropdown present
journeys.description: Position filter dropdown renders with 'All Positions' default option

journeys.name: Pipeline filter: Zone dropdown present
journeys.description: Zone filter dropdown renders with 'All Zones' default option

journeys.name: Pipeline: Add Prospect button visible and links to /recruiter/prospects
journeys.description: Add Prospect button is rendered in the pipeline control bar linking to the prospects browser

journeys.name: Pipeline: click Add Prospect button navigates to prospects
journeys.description: Clicking Add Prospect button navigates to the /recruiter/prospects page

journeys.name: Pipeline: column count badges rendered
journeys.description: Each Kanban column shows a numeric count badge for the number of prospects in that stage

journeys.name: Pipeline: empty columns show 'No prospects' placeholder
journeys.description: Columns with no prospects display 'No prospects' empty state text

journeys.name: Navigate to /recruiter/compare — page loads
journeys.description: Compare page renders without crash, showing either comparison table or empty state

journeys.name: Compare page: heading and athlete info visible
journeys.description: Compare page shows 'Compare Athletes' heading or empty state with appropriate messaging

journeys.name: Compare page: Export Data button visible
journeys.description: Compare page renders an Export Data button for CSV download when athletes are available

journeys.name: Compare page: Add Athlete button visible
journeys.description: Compare page shows an Add Athlete button that links to /recruiter/pipeline

journeys.name: Compare page: stat sections render (Physical Attributes, Combine, Academics)
journeys.description: When athletes exist, comparison table shows Physical Attributes, Combine Performance, and Academics sections

journeys.name: Navigate to /recruiter/territory — page loads with heading
journeys.description: Territory page loads showing 'Territory Assignments' heading

journeys.name: Territory page: no bad text
journeys.description: Territory page does not render undefined, NaN, or [object Object]

journeys.name: Territory page: quick stats (Assigned, Open Zones, Coverage)
journeys.description: Territory page displays Assigned count, Open Zones count, and Coverage percentage stats

journeys.name: Territory page: zone cards show athlete and blue chip counts
journeys.description: Zone assignment cards show 'athletes' and 'blue chips' counts for each territory

journeys.name: Territory page: Save Assignments button visible
journeys.description: Territory page footer has a Save Assignments button

journeys.name: Sidebar navigation: Pipeline link visible and works
journeys.description: Sidebar has Pipeline nav link that navigates to /recruiter/pipeline

journeys.name: Sidebar navigation: Athletes link visible and navigates
journeys.description: Sidebar has Athletes nav link that navigates to /recruiter/prospects

journeys.name: Sidebar navigation: all recruiter links present
journeys.description: Sidebar renders all expected recruiter nav items: Pipeline, Athletes, Campaigns, Messages, Analytics
